name: execute_shell_command
description:
Execute a shell command and return its output. If there is a memory about suggested commands, read that first.
Never execute unsafe shell commands!
IMPORTANT: Do not use this tool to start
  * long-running processes (e.g. servers) that are not intended to terminate quickly,
  * processes that require user interaction. Returns a JSON object containing the command's stdout and optionally stderr output.

cwd.title: Cwd
cwd.description: The working directory to execute the command in. If None, the project root will be used.

capture_stderr.title: Capture Stderr
capture_stderr.description: Whether to capture and return stderr output.

max_answer_chars.title: Max Answer Chars
max_answer_chars.description:
If the output is longer than this number of characters,
no content will be returned. -1 means using the default value, don't adjust unless there is no other way to get the content
required for the task.
